channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Tony Blair says Labour must abandon net zero, support Trump and move firmly to the right
item.description: Tony Blair says Labour must abandon net zero, support Trump and move firmly to the right

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Tony Blair’s essay on Labour failings gets full marks for being unhelpful
item.description: Tony Blair’s essay on Labour failings gets full marks for being unhelpful

item.title: i Politics: Blair turns on Labour's leadership rivals: Britain is becoming irrelevant
item.description: Blair turns on Labour's leadership rivals: Britain is becoming irrelevant

item.title: ITVX: Swinney dismisses Starmer's claim questions remain after Murrell embezzlement | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Swinney dismisses Starmer's claim questions remain after Murrell embezzlement | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: i Politics: Starmer to ready UK for war with billions in defence spending
item.description: Starmer to ready UK for war with billions in defence spending

item.title: The Guardian: UK may be ‘tipped into a general election’ if Burnham replaces Starmer, says Harman - The Guardian
item.description: UK may be ‘tipped into a general election’ if Burnham replaces Starmer, says Harman - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reform UK’s Makerfield candidate appeared to doubt seriousness of Covid on X
item.description: Reform UK’s Makerfield candidate appeared to doubt seriousness of Covid on X

item.title: BBC Politics: John Swinney denies 'sweeping Murrell scandal under carpet'
item.description: John Swinney denies 'sweeping Murrell scandal under carpet'

item.title: i Politics: Cabinet ministers feared Trump's reaction to social media ban
item.description: Cabinet ministers feared Trump's reaction to social media ban

item.title: ITVX: Starmer promises action to tackle social media harm in 'weeks, not months' - ITVX
